text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — please check out the mod handbook and feel free to reach out if you have any questions. Looking forward to working with you!

Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have your energy helping run our community events — keep an eye on the events channel for upcoming opportunities. Glad to have you here!

Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. Your experience and guidance will mean a lot to newer members — please introduce yourself in the mentors channel when you get a chance. So glad to have you with us!
